args.code:
import pandas as pd

books_df = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-563214415947203349'])
reviews_df = pd.DataFrame(locals()['var_function-call-620395369173281664'])

merged_df = pd.merge(books_df, reviews_df, left_on='book_id', right_on='purchase_id', how='inner')

result_titles = merged_df['title'].tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result_titles)
